PowerShell(git add .githooks/pre-commit neuroslm/readme_metrics.py scripts/README.template scripts/render_readme.py tests/test_readme_metrics.py 2>&1)
PowerShell(git ls-files logs\\ | Where-Object { $_ -match "^logs/20260615-" } | Measure-Object -Line | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Lines)
PowerShell(git ls-files logs\\ | Where-Object { $_ -match "^logs/20260615-194643" } | Measure-Object -Line | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Lines)
PowerShell(git ls-files logs\\ | Where-Object { $_ -match "^logs/20260615-" } | Sort-Object | Select-Object -Last 5)
PowerShell(git ls-files logs\\ | Where-Object { $_ -match "^logs/20260615-" } | Select-Object -First 3; Write-Host "..."; git ls-files logs\\ | Where-Object { $_ -match "^logs/20260615/arch/" })
PowerShell(git ls-files logs\\ | Where-Object { $_ -match "^logs/20260615-" } | ForEach-Object { git rm --cached $_ 2>&1 } | Select-Object -Last 3)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "logs\\" -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "^\\d{8}-" } | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum | Select-Object Count)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "logs\\" -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "^\\d{8}-" } | ForEach-Object { \(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum } | Measure-Object -Sum | Select-Object Sum)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem . -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne ".git" } | ForEach-Object { $size = \(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; [PSCustomObject]@{Name=$_.Name; SizeMB=[Math]::Round\($size/1MB,1\)} } | Sort-Object SizeMB -Descending | Select-Object -First 10)
